info.title: Gnovium Knowledge OS API
info.description:
Gnovium API is a local-first Knowledge Operating System API for building applications where knowledge behaves like a living system rather than a collection of disconnected documents.

This API supports:
- Block-based content management with rich text editing
- Structured relational knowledge modeling with typed entities and properties
- Interactive knowledge graph with traversal, pathfinding, and queries
- Git-inspired versioning with branches, snapshots, and visual diffs
- AI-powered semantic search and natural language question answering
- Workspace governance with health scoring and duplicate detection
- Cross-device synchronization with conflict resolution
- File management with presigned URL uploads (cloud mode)

Deployment modes:
- **Local Mode** (default): SQLite storage, offline-first, local AI via Ollama
- **Cloud Mode**: PostgreSQL, S3 storage, managed infrastructure

get.description: Public liveness endpoint for load balancers, uptime checks, and deployment smoke tests.

post.description: Cloud-only. Creates a user account. Passwords must be at least 8 characters.
Cloud-only. Authenticates with email and password.

get.description: Cloud-only. Checks whether an email address is already registered. Public endpoint.

post.description: Cloud-only. Authenticates using a Google OAuth credential token.
Cloud-only. Uses a valid refresh token to issue a new access token. Only a new access_token is returned — the existing refresh token is reused.
Cloud-only. Revokes the current refresh-token session so it cannot be used again.

get.description: Cloud-only. Returns the authenticated user's profile.

patch.description: Cloud-only. Partially updates the authenticated user's profile.

get.description: Returns workspaces owned by or accessible to the current user.

post.description: Creates a workspace and associates it with the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieves a single workspace by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates workspace name, description, or settings.

get.description: Returns workspace health and activity snapshot.
Returns entities, optionally filtered by workspace and entity type.

post.description: Creates a page, record, or graph node inside a workspace.

get.description: Retrieves one entity by ID including its properties and metadata.

patch.description: Partially updates title, icon, cover image, archive flag, or properties.

delete.description: Deletes an entity permanently. Can be restored via POST /entities/{id}/restore.

post.description: Restores a deleted or archived entity.
Deep copies an entity with all blocks and properties.
Creates a child entity under a parent.

get.description: Cloud-only. Returns version history for an entity. Returns 404 in local mode.
Returns entity type definitions for a workspace.

post.description: Defines a reusable type for entities.
Creates a block inside an entity.

get.description: Retrieves a single block by ID.

post.description: Moves a block to a new parent and/or position.

get.description: Lists all blocks for a specific entity.
Returns all tags for a workspace.

post.description: Creates a new tag with optional color.

get.description: Retrieves a single tag by ID.

patch.description: Updates a tag's name or color.

post.description: Applies a tag to an entity.

delete.description: Removes a tag from an entity.

get.description: Returns graph relations for a workspace.

post.description: Creates a typed edge between two entities.

get.description: Retrieves a single relation by ID.
Returns relations where entity is source.
Returns relations where entity is target.

post.description: Creates a comment on entity or block.

get.description: Cloud-only. Returns changesets for a branch.

post.description: Cloud-only. Restores entity to a saved version.
Cloud-only. Structured diff between snapshots or branches.

get.description: Searches entities by keyword or semantic mode.

post.description: Returns an S3 presigned upload URL. Only available in cloud mode; returns 404 in local mode.

get.description: Streams file content. Local mode serves from disk; cloud mode redirects to S3.

post.description: Deletes file records with zero entity links (DB + disk).
Exports workspace data as a portable JSON bundle.
Writes workspace export JSON to instance/backups/ on the server.
Imports workspace data from a JSON bundle. Note: the files field in the import body is informational only and is not imported.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained via OAuth2 or direct login. Format: Bearer <token>

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for server-to-server authentication. Generate from workspace settings.

scopes.workspace:write: Create, update, and delete workspace content
scopes.workspace:admin: Manage workspace settings, members, and billing
scopes.offline_access: Receive refresh tokens for long-lived access
